allow: Bash(python -c "import aiohttp, pandas, pyarrow, duckdb; print\('aiohttp', aiohttp.__version__\); print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('pyarrow', pyarrow.__version__\); print\('duckdb', duckdb.__version__\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import aiohttp, pandas, pyarrow, duckdb, ta, numpy; print\('aiohttp', aiohttp.__version__\); print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('pyarrow', pyarrow.__version__\); print\('duckdb', duckdb.__version__\); print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\)")

PowerShell(Write-Output "PYTHONHOME=$env:PYTHONHOME"; Write-Output "PYTHONPATH=$env:PYTHONPATH"; Write-Output "--- where python ---"; \(Get-Command python -All | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source\); Write-Output "--- py launcher ---"; try { py -0p } catch { Write-Output "no py launcher" }; Write-Output "--- venvs ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory -Force | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
PowerShell(py -3.12 -c "import pandas, duckdb, aiohttp, pyarrow, numpy, ta; print\('all present'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(py -3.11 -c "import pandas, duckdb, aiohttp, pyarrow, numpy, ta; print\('all present'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(py -3.11 -c "import pandas, duckdb, aiohttp, pyarrow, numpy, ta; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('duckdb', duckdb.__version__\); print\('aiohttp', aiohttp.__version__\); print\('pyarrow', pyarrow.__version__\); print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\); print\('ta', ta.__version__\)")

Bash(cat .gitignore; echo "---engine---"; ls -R engine 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---frontend---"; ls -R frontend 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---search wide for parquet---"; find /d/GitHub -maxdepth 4 -name '*.parquet' 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(py -3.11 -c "import pandas, duckdb, pyarrow; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\)")
